title: BTA Cupboards
description: Unlike chests, cupboards connect vertically and mirrored like doors.
body: # BTA-Cupboards *Unlike chests, cupboards connect vertically and mirrored like doors.* Can be crafted by putting a single chest in the crafting slot and can be crafted back into the chest. Idea and textures by Zainnhy Requirements: - BTA (https://www.betterthanadventure.net) - Babric for BTA https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/babric-instance-repo/releases/tag/v7.3_04 - HalpLibe (https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/bta-halplibe)
